subcodes.first_line: Some time ago, in the letter of this servant, mention of thee flowed forth and was revealed from the Most Exalted Pen. God willing, the pure wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندی قبل در مکتوب عبد حاضر از قلم اعلی ذکر شما جاری و نازل انشاء الله رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
